displayName: Telco Siddhi QoD Assurance Burst Policy
description: Siddhi-based APIM custom policy that protects 5G network assurance and QoD APIs from event storms while keeping enterprise SLA traffic measurable.
businessStory: When enterprise 5G or QoD assurance traffic spikes, the telco must protect network assurance APIs without losing observability or monetization context.

displayName: Telco Siddhi SIM Swap Fraud Fair Use Policy
description: Siddhi-based APIM custom policy that protects high-risk SIM swap and Open Gateway fraud APIs with partner/app-level fair-use controls.
businessStory: Fraud APIs such as SIM swap risk are valuable and sensitive. A bank, wallet or marketplace should be protected from abusive partner traffic while legitimate checks continue.
